# ThonkBoard

> ThonkBoard is a browser-based spatial thinking canvas where users build directed graphs of ideas and pressure-test them with AI. No backend, no accounts - everything runs locally, AI calls go directly to the user's chosen provider with their own API key, and all data is stored in localStorage/IndexedDB.

## Purpose

ThonkBoard is for individuals working through complex problems - ideation, research, decisions, argument stress-testing. The core metaphor: plant a central idea, branch it into related thoughts, let AI ask hard questions, find problems, and generate new angles. The graph grows as thinking deepens.

## Node Types

Every board has exactly one **Core** node (the central thesis; cannot be deleted). From it, users build a graph of:

- **Idea** - a branch, variant, or proposed direction (yellow)
- **Problem** - a flaw, risk, or constraint with a severity score 0-1 (orange)
- **Question** - an open inquiry or assumption to test; can be yes/no (gray)
- **Answer** - response to a question or solution to a problem; tracks whether AI-generated (green)
- **Note** - freeform sticky; no structure, minimal AI interaction (tan)
- **Source** - an attached markdown or text document digested by AI; full text stored in IndexedDB; silently informs all AI actions on the board (blue)

## Edge Relations

Directed edges carry semantic meaning: **spawns** (idea -> child idea), **questions** (node -> question about it), **answers** (question -> answer), **argues** (node critiques another), **fixes** (problem -> solution), **expands** (old core -> forked core), **sources** (node -> source document).

## AI Features

All AI actions appear in a floating toolbar above the selected node. AI depth is tracked: nodes with aiDepth >= 3 get an "AI Fatigue" warning and actions are disabled to discourage chaining AI output too far from human reasoning.

**Per-node actions:**
- **Push Thinking** (Core/Idea) - generates 3-5 mixed starter nodes (ideas + questions + problems) from different angles to kick off exploration
- **Ask me** (Core/Idea/Answer) - AI generates one sharp question about the node; spawns a Question node
- **Answer me...** (Core/Idea/Problem/Answer) - user types a custom question; AI answers with optional web search; spawns Question + Answer nodes
- **Find Problems** (Core/Idea/Answer) - AI critiques the node; spawns Problem nodes with severity scores
- **Generate Ideas** (Core/Idea) - AI proposes new directions; spawns child Idea nodes
- **Suggest Solution** (Problem) - AI generates a practical fix; spawns an Answer node with a "fixes" relation
- **Generate Answer** (Question) - AI answers the question; spawns an Answer node
- **Correct This...** (AI-generated Answer) - user describes the mistake; AI revises the answer in-place

**Board-level actions:**
- **Summarize** - three modes: List (curated bullet summary of accepted ideas), Analysis (3-4 paragraph critical review), Gaps (unquestioned assumptions and missing angles). Cached by graph fingerprint.
- **Fix Grammar** - batch action on multi-selected nodes; cleans spelling, applies sentence case, adds punctuation to titles

**Behind the scenes:**
- **Conflict Detection** - after any title change, AI checks the node against all others for contradictions; cooldown 30s; conflicts shown in editor panel with resolution options
- **Conflict Resolution** - two paths: new direction wins, or existing direction preserved; AI rewrites node body for chosen path
- **Propagation** - after approving a Q&A answer, AI identifies up to 3 other nodes that would benefit from the same insight
- **Source Digestion** - on import, AI extracts title and ~1024-char summary from source documents

**Supported AI providers:** Google Gemini (default, free tier available), OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek, Ollama (local). Toggle **Turbo Thonking** in settings to switch to the smarter model for each provider. Toggle **Web Search** to enrich AI answers with live facts (Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic only).

## Canvas Interactions

- Pan: drag background, middle-click drag, or right-click drag
- Zoom: scroll, pinch (Ctrl+scroll), or toolbar +/-/0/fit-view buttons
- Select: click node; shift-click for multi-select; bounding box appears for batch actions
- Move: drag any node; edges reattach automatically
- Connect: drag from a node's output handle to another's input handle
- Collapse/Expand: subtrees can be collapsed; descendant count shown; state persisted per board
- Lock: disables all dragging and connections for presentation/view-only mode
- Copy/Paste: Ctrl+C / Ctrl+V on single non-Core nodes; preserves type, title, body, emoji

## Keyboard Shortcuts

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| I | Add Idea at viewport center |
| Q | Add Question |
| P | Add Problem |
| N | Add Note |
| Ctrl/Cmd+Z | Undo (20-step history) |
| Ctrl/Cmd+Y or Ctrl/Cmd+Shift+Z | Redo |
| Ctrl/Cmd+S | Save board |
| Ctrl/Cmd+C | Copy selected node |
| Ctrl/Cmd+V | Paste node |
| Ctrl/Cmd+K | Open command palette / search |
| +/-/0 | Zoom in / out / reset |

## Boards & Persistence

Multiple boards are supported; each stored separately in localStorage. Board metadata (name, emoji, last used) listed in the hamburger menu with minimap previews on hover. Auto-save runs on every graph change (500ms debounce). Undo/redo operates within the active board session only.

## Export & Import

- **Save / Save As** - downloads `.thonk` JSON; on Chrome with File System Access API, Ctrl+S saves silently to the linked file
- **Load Board** - imports `.thonk` or `.json` files
- **Import Source** - adds a `.md` or `.txt` document as a Source node; text stored in IndexedDB
- **Export PNG** - renders the full canvas as a downloadable image
- **Export Mermaid** - converts the graph to a `.mmd` flowchart file (shapes and colors match node types; Source nodes excluded)

## Editor Panel

The right-side panel opens when a node is selected. It shows: inline title editing, an AI-generated summary bar, a conflict bar (navigate to or resolve contradictions), Write/Preview tabs for the node body (Markdown with a formatting toolbar), and a copy-to-clipboard button. Changes auto-save on panel close.

## Command Palette

Opened with Ctrl/Cmd+K. Full-text search across node titles with filters for node type (Idea, Problem, Question, Answer, Note) and status (loved / dropped / undecided). Scope can be narrowed to the current board or expanded to all boards.

## Tech Stack

React 19 + TypeScript, Vite, React Flow v12 (@xyflow/react), Tailwind CSS v4, Radix UI, Lucide icons, html-to-image, react-markdown + remark-gfm. Browser APIs: localStorage, IndexedDB, File System Access (Chrome).
